alternatives_considered: Previous name was too generic, didn't communicate what the project actually is
content.context: The project evolved from a generic 'copilot' concept into a distinct identity. The name LEO emerged organically — it was already the name of the Manager of Managers agent, and the acronym Living Ecosystem Orchestrator captures the neural KB architecture.
content.decision: Repository renamed to leo-core. CLI command is leo. LEO = Living Ecosystem Orchestrator.
